verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Cycles pass for all resources; OS unaffected each cycle; Audit verified; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.cycle_evidence: The demo CLI cycles acquire->release across all four registered resources (port, worker, lease, GPU) with all_restored:true.
gate_result.os_evidence: Per-resource probe(before) equals probe(after) for every cycle (all_os_equal:true) — the OS state is byte-equal after each acquire/release round trip.
gate_result.audit_evidence: The audit contains exactly one acquire and one verified release per resource (8 lines for 4 resources), asserted from the log.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The spec spawns the real demo CLI and asserts on its emitted report and audit file.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-107 is complete: acquire/release cycles pass for every registered resource with the OS provably unaffected each cycle (before/after probes equal) and the audit verified line-by-line — one acquire and one restored release per resource.
